elements.original_description: A green cartoon worm with dollar signs on its body, chewing on a stack of dollar bills. The worm has a mischievous expression and is surrounded by small bite marks on the bills. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a bright green cartoon worm with clear dollar signs ($) patterned on its body, actively chewing on a crisp stack of American dollar bills. The worm has a mischievous, sly expression. Show small, distinct bite marks and tears on the edges of the bills. Pure white background. Clean, high-contrast flat vector art with bold outlines. No shading, no gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A shopping cart filled with groceries gradually becomes empty as a green worm eats away at the items. The cart has a sad expression and the worm looks satisfied. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon showing a shopping cart with a sad, personified expression. The cart is initially full of colorful grocery items (like fruits, vegetables, and packaged goods) on the left side, but they gradually disappear towards the right side where a satisfied-looking green cartoon worm is eating them. The transition from full to empty should be clear and stylized. Pure white background. Clean, high-contrast flat vector art with bold outlines. No shading, no gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
